title: Synthetic AI Employee Workflow Brief
summary: Public-safe brief for a governed support-triage AI employee workflow.

title: Customer Support Department
summary: Synthetic department that owns the support-triage AI employee.

title: Triage Assistant
summary: Synthetic AI employee that classifies support requests and prepares proposed responses.

title: Support Triage Operator
summary: Role responsible for classifying requests, selecting the next owner and preparing safe proposed actions.

title: Request Classification
summary: Skill for classifying support requests by topic, urgency, sensitivity and owner.

title: Support Playbook
summary: Synthetic knowledge object for allowed response patterns and escalation rules.

title: Reviewed Request Patterns
summary: Reviewed pattern memory that can inform future classification after learning approval.

title: Ticket Workspace
summary: Synthetic tool boundary for reading ticket context and writing approved ticket updates.

title: Prepare Response
summary: Capability required to prepare a user-visible response proposal.

title: External Response Approval
summary: Policy requiring human approval before sending user-visible support responses.

title: External Response Approval Gate
summary: Gate that separates proposed support responses from executed responses.

title: Support Triage Workflow
summary: Workflow for request classification, response proposal, approval, audited result and learning proposal.

title: Propose Customer Response
summary: Proposed action that prepares a customer response but does not send it without approval.

title: Response Reviewed Result
summary: Audited result recording reviewer outcome for the proposed support response.

title: Response Quality Feedback
summary: Feedback from reviewing response quality, policy fit and escalation correctness.

title: Escalate Sensitive Requests
summary: Proposed lesson that sensitive support requests should be escalated before drafting a response.

title: Specialist Support Service
summary: Synthetic federation endpoint for escalating specialized support requests.
